statement: In every magma, Equation 812 (`x = y * (z * ((w * u) * y))`) implies Equation 930 (`x = y * ((y * z) * (y * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0967
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w u) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op y z) (op y x)))
